form.formComment: Resuming after four months. Finished off last campaign when last at Huntingdon December 7 over 3200m, slow track; 22 len behind We're Red And Blue carrying 76kg at $34. Previously first up; 7 of 8 starters at Wetherby November 15 over 3200m, slow track; 33 len behind Saligo Bay carrying 73.5kg at $13. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Useful type. Comes off a 36 day let-up. Last start pulled up at Ayr on March 6 over 4100m. Race before won by 13 len Ludlow on February 26 over 3200m defeating Raging Al with 79.5kg at $1.90 in a hurdle. On his best form is sure to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Racing well. Resumes off a 51 day letup. Last run finished second in a small field at Sedgefield on February 19 over 3300m, 19 len behind Coup De Coeur carrying 73kg at $2.80. The start before that; won by 6 len Sedgefield on February 4 over 3300m defeating Sea Thrift with 76kg at $3 in a steeplechase. Strong winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up finished eighth of 10 starters at Kempton Park on February 2 over 3200m, 42 len behind Gooloogong with 75.5kg at $5.50. Second-up finished fifth in a small field at Ludlow on March 30 over 3200m, 18 len behind Jack Hyde with 74.5kg at $9. Rates highly in this field and is expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Freshened for 29 days. Last start finished fifth in a small field at Fakenham on March 13 over 3200m, 29 len behind Morning Mayhem carrying 71.5kg at $15. Race before finished fourth in a small field at Newcastle All Weather on February 24 over 2000m, 10 len behind Triple Double A with 57kg at $5. Right in the mix if anywhere near his best.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Last outing finished third of 14 starters at Musselburgh on March 20 over 3500m, 1.3 len behind Light Fandango with 67kg at $6.50. The run before finished third of 8 starters at Doncaster on February 27 over 3300m, 16 len behind Light Fandango carrying 68kg at $6.50. Can return to winning form.
